description: Ollama-hosted cloud inference (Turbo). OpenAI-compatible chat completions at https://ollama.com/v1/chat/completions. Bearer auth via ollama.com API key. Model list and exact endpoint path PENDING VERIFICATION — see sourceUrls.

descriptionI18n.ko: Ollama 호스팅 클라우드 추론 (Turbo). OpenAI 호환 chat completions, ollama.com API 키로 Bearer 인증. 모델 목록과 정확한 endpoint는 sourceUrls 참조 필요.
